Cinematic wide 16:9 frame in modern social-first product photography style, SCARLETT wearing light casual beachwear suitable for water and promenade seated centered at a crisp white vanity in an airy minimal interior studio, lifting a coral lipstick tube from its minimal box with fingers lightly tracing the matte finish in a moment of potential energy and slow deliberate motion, sunlight slicing through open windows casting clean directional shadows across neutral linen surfaces, bright natural window light with high-key airy feel and subtle warmth in highlights, shallow depth of field emphasizing tactile material details and the product interaction against the white vanity backdrop, handheld micro-movement implied in the still frame, color palette of crisp whites and soft neutrals with a vibrant accent pop.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: INT. BONDI STUDIO - Crisp white vanity space with open windows allowing natural sunlight
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
